titleStmt.title: SII 20.175: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 175. (B.K. No. 36 of 1937-38.) HIRĒ BĒVINŪR, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Bhōgalinga.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1112 (nara-nētra-Śaśi-Sōma-Indu), Sādhāraṇa, Śrāvaṇa, Pūrṇimā, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1190, July 18. The week-day was Wednesday, when the tithi ended at ·72.

The inscription states that at the request of Siridēvi, the wife of Boppaṇa-nāyaka, to observe kshitiruha-nōṁpi, Daṇḍanāyaka Māyidēva, the minister of the king, planted a number of trees and established a charity fair (dharma-santhe) in Bēvinūr situated in Tardavāḍi 1000, in the presence of Mummuridaṇḍas and others of the Thirty-six-villages division. Boppaṇa-nāyaka was governing the division of Thirty-six-villages as a subordinate of Māyidēva.

It also records a gift of land and house for the maintenance of the above charities made to Bandarasa, the manneya of Tarddavāḍi-1000 and to Boppaṇanāyaka by Māyidēva. Further gifts of trees to the temples of Taleyakāvadēva, Rēvaṇēśvara and Bhōgēśvara and also to Sōmanātha-paṇḍita, the composer of the record, are registered.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© cōḷāṁbhōrāśiyaurvvānaḷanahitaturuḥkādrisaṁghātavajraṁ gauḷāṁbhōdāḷi jhaṁjhāniḷanatuḷa
baḷaṁ gūrjjarēbhēṁdrasiṁhaṁ kāḷiṁgānaṁgagaurīvaranenipesevaṁ tāḷdidī bhillamōrbbī pāḷaṁgārpaḍi cakrēśvararenalese
vaṁ ba(ṁ)ṇnisalu ballanāvaṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . visaruhadiṁ koḷaṁ niśi niśādhipaniṁ dinanāthaniṁdavā
gasavamarēṁdraniṁ divijasaṁtati kēvaṇadiṁde māṇikaṁ vasumatiyalli śōbhisuvavolneṟe yādavarājyalakṣitōbhisu
vudu māyidēvarathinīśvaraniṁdenalēna ba(ṁ)ṇnapeṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . surapati yirdda dēvasabhe paṁka
javirdda sarōjaṣaṁḍavā surataruvirdda naṁdanavanaṁ hariyirddamṛtābdhiyoppuvaṁtire nṛpamēru bhillamana
māttyaśikhāmaṇi māyidēvanādarisuva maṁtri boppaṇacamūpatiyirdeḍe yiṁtivo ppuguṁ . dhuradhīraṁ nere
yoḍegaṁḍanadhaṭaṁ kebbaṭṭakāḷāṁjarōrbbare paryyaṁtavadhīśvaraṁ kopaṇapurādhīśvaraṁ khēcarēśvaraṁ śani
vārasiddhiyenipī śrībaṁdabhūpāḷanoḷdoreyārmmaṁneyavallabhaṁge dharaṇīnātharkkaḷī dhātriyoḷu . pra
tipakṣakṣitipāḷakakṣayakaraṁ prōccaṁḍadōrddaṁḍamaṁḍitakaukṣēyakavirda vidviśanṛpaprāṇa prayāṇa pratiṣṭhita
mauhūrttitanuṁnatikke śaraṇāyātakṣamāpāḷakapratatīrakṣaṇavendoḍārppaḍiye pēḷśrī baṁdabhūpāḷanoḷ .
maṁḍaḷapūjyanoḷprajegaḷaṁ pratipāḷipa satyavaṁtanoḷbaṁdaṇaśūranoḷsale dayāpara noḷguṇi rēvakabbe gāvu
ṇḍiya maṁmanoḷsakaḷadha(ṁ)rmmaguṇānvitanappa mallagāvuṁḍanoḷāruvēṁ doreye lōkada varttisuvī gavuṁ
ḍugaḷ . palavuṁ dvīpadoḷoppuguṁ negaḷdā jaṁbūdvīpamādvīpadoḷnelasirkkuṁ sale mēṁṭiyaṁdadoḷagaṁ
tā mēru tanmēruviṁ viḷasaddakṣiṇabhāgadoḷbharatasukṣētraṁdidakkalli kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ sale tarddavāḍiyeseguṁ tatkuṁ
ntaḷakṣōṇiyoḷ . A viśayadalli sogayisuvudēvēḷveṁ dharaṇigeseva taleduḍugeya volmūvattāruṁbāḍaṁ
śrīvāsaṁ rājadhāniyaṁ stutiyisuveṁ . palavuṁ vēdada śāstradāgamada vidyābhyāsi viprarkkaḷiṁdaḷi
yiṁ kōgileyiṁ śukapratiyiṁ pauḍrēkṣu daṁḍaṁgaḷiṁdalarddaṁbhōruhaśaṁḍadiṁ palaReadprauḍhēkṣu.
vumudyānaṁgaḷiṁ śiṣyasaṁkuḷadiṁdoppuva bēvinūrgge doreyē bhūlōkadoḷpa ṭṭaṇaṁ . surasēve paṁcamaṁ
guru surapuradoḷviśamaviśadarggāvāsaṁ piriduṁ bhōgāvatiyene dhareyoḻagī bēvinūrgge saridoreyoḷavē ©
Ā vēṇurājaniṁdaṁ mūvaḍi boppaṇacamūpaneṁdeṁbinegaṁ mūvattāṟuṁbāḍamanē vēḷveṁ māyidēvanājñe
yoḷāḷvaṁ . Enipā boppaṇanāyakaṁ sacivacūḍāratnanā māyidēvana pādāṁba� manōmudadino
ldārādhanaṁ māḍe mecci niyōgakke niyōjisutte neṟe mūvattāṟubāḍakkamāttyana māḍalpratipāḷisutta
vesedaṁ śrī sauvidallōttamaṁ . Ā sauvidallakuladoḷlēsenisuva boppaṇayyanarddhāṁgi yenippī si
ridēvige satiyarppāsaṭiye patihitarkke viśvaṁbhareyoḷu . girirājātmaje śaiḷajāte siri nīrmmāna
śye vākkāṁte bittaradiṁdeyde pitāmahaṁge vadhuvādaḷgaṁgeyaṁ jahnuvādaradiṁdīṁ ṭiye jānuviṁ
tegedaneṁdaṁdēnavappārṭiye dhareyoḷkēḷsiridēviyakka ninagārssādriśyaveṁdeṁbenō . vṛtasārasamu
ccayadoḷsmritiyoḷkēḷenitu nōṁpiyoḷavenitanitaṁ satataṁ nōntolaviṁdaṁ kṣitiruha viduvondu
nōṁpiyuṁṭene kēḷdaḷu . paramānandade kēḷdu bhūtaḷada kaḻpōrbbījavendendu māma ranaṁ nēṟile nīḷeyaṁ pala
sumaṁ kharjjūramaṁ teṁgumaṁ varapūgītaruvaṁ vanaspatiyanatyānaṁdadiṁdiṭṭu tāṁ dhare meccuttire māyidēvane
sēvī dha(ṁ)rmmaṁdidikkaṁdadaṁ . mūvattāṟuṁ bīḍaṁ gāvuṁḍarsseṭṭigutta muṁmuri daṁḍaṁ śrī vīrabīravaṇigaṁ bhāvisalā ga
vaṟegātrigarssuṁkigaraṁ . nerapiyevarellaraṁ kuḷḷirisiye kēḷda dharmmasaṁtheyenisiye māydēvarasaṁ māḍida
dhar(ṁ)mmaṁ dhareyoḷagidu dharmmasaṁteyācaṁdrārkkaṁ . neredī saṁtheyoḷāne māṇika turaṁgaṁ paṭṭakarmmādiyaṁ
baradhānyaṁ dhana śāśvataṁ palavu bhaṁḍaṁ māṟalēnādaḍaṁ piriduṁ taṁneya nāḍa nāḷvavarggadāyaṁ suṁkaveṁdaṁdavarnnirutaṁ
rauravadalli taṁma sakuṭuṁbaṁ bīḷvaraṁntākṣaṇaṁ . Ī saṁtheyallikelabarppēsade kēḷsuṁka veṁdu nuḍiva khaḷarkkaḷsāsira paśu
vuṁ pārvvaranā suravene vāraṇāśiyoḷkoṁdavarggaḷu . maṁneyarāḷu maṁneyara perggaḍe maṁneya nāḍavāḷvava
rmmannipa mānasarkkaraṇa perggaḍe nāḍadhikāri tējasaṁpannarenippa suṁkigarivarvvanadoḷnera dirdda saṁteyoḷmaṁnisadāḷimā
ḍidaḍe gōdvijamāṁsamanoldu melduvaru . kṣitiruhamaṁ saṁteyumaṁ pratipāḷisida vargge rājyasaṁpada
vakkuṁ pratipāḷisadirddaḍe santatiyuṁ sakuṭuṁbasahitavaghadoḷagāḷvaru . vinutaṁ boppaṇanāyakaṁ sacivacū
ḍāratnanā māyidēvana pādakke vinamranāgi nalaviṁdaṁ biṁnapaṁ māḍidaṁ banamaṁ santeyaneyde ninna pesariṁdāṁ māḍideṁ jīya
yeṁdene kēḷdeṁnayadharmmavendu besasalpasarvvārtthavaṁ māḍidaṁ . yādava cakrēśvaranā mēdinīpati bhillamōrbbipaṁ vaṁdaṇado
ḷsādaradiṁ rājyaṁgeyalādiya sakavarśavenitenalpēḷvenadaṁ . naranētraṁ sasi sōma ninduvenalā sādhāraṇāhvaṁkavāgi
ralā śrāvaṇa paurṇnamāse guruvāraṁ rāhuparvaṁgaḷoppiralā yādava cakri bhillamana maṁtri śrēṣṭhanā
māyidēvarasaṁ saṁteyumaṁ vanaspatiyumaṁ sarvvārtthavaṁ māḍida . neravī saṁ teyumaṁ vanaspatiyumaṁ tātparyya
diṁ nāḍanāḷvarasuṁ maṁneyaruṁ prabhupratatiyuṁ gāvuṇḍaruṁ nāḍa saudareyuṁ muṁmaridaṇḍamuṁ modalva nānā
dēsiyuṁ seṭṭiguttarumārayvarupēkṣisalnanarakavakkuṁ vēdaśāstrōktiyiṁ . śrīmatu taleyakāvadēvargge māvina mara mūṟu
huṇase Oṁdu nēṟilu Ondu . rēvaṇēśvaradēvargge māvina mara mūṟu puṇuseyondu nēṟilondu © bhōgēśvaradēvargge māvina
mara mūṟu puṇuseyondu nēṟilondu © sātēśvaradēvargge māmaraṁ mūṟu nēṟilondu puṇiseyondu ©
brahmapurige māmaraneṁṭu puṇiseyondu nēṟilondu © sāsanava pēḷda beḍagina sōmanāthapaṇḍitarggemāmaraneṁ
. seṭṭigutta mummuridaṁḍarkke māmaranaydu © khēḍage svayaṁbhudēvargge māmaraneṁṭu puṇuseyondu nēṟi
londu © gāmuṁḍaṁge hāgakke Eṇne solageyondu . seṭṭiguttarggeṇne solage yondu . saṁteyoḷagāyadāya kiṟu
kuḷamantarikeyilla . © śrīmatu yādavacakravarti bhillamadēvana maṁtri māyidēvadaṇḍa nāyakaṁ taṁmāḷkeya
mūvattāṟuṁ bāḍada rājadhāni bēvinūralu dharmmadāraveyumaṁ dharmmasaṁtheyaṁ māḍiyā banavaṁ sāgisuvantāgi tardda
vāḍisāsirada manneyaṁ vīra bandarasaṁgaṁ taṁnadhikāri boppaṇanāyakaṁgaṁ banake keyi maneyaṁ biḍivendu besasalu bēvinūra
mallagāvuṇḍanumalliya yeṁṭu hiṭṭu sthāna mānya sēnabōvanaṟuvattokkalu mukhya vāgi Āḷuhurada sīme
yiṁ mūḍalu khēḍada sīmeyiṁ teṁkalu rēvaṇēśvarada gōveya geyya sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu banavaṁ palavu marananiṭṭu
lēsāgi māḷpantāgi banakāṟa cavuṁḍeyaṁge sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa māṇikēśvarada kōla mattaru panneraḍu paṁnikeyya nivēśana
© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ tasmādēśāṁ bhāginō pārtthivēṁdrā kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavaddhiḥ bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdra . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . [©]
Ā banakāṟa cauḍeyana sarvvanamaśyada hanniṁmattaroḷage banakāṟa nannayaṁge mattaṟu Āṟugeyya nivēśana . Ūroḍe
yarakke maṁneyarūrāḷvarakke nāḍa koṁḍeyarakkiṁtārādāḍavī dharmmama nōntire kiḍisidavaradhōgatigiḷivaru .
sāsanamidāvudelliya sāsanamārittarēke salisuve nānī sāsanamaneṁba pātakanā sakaḷaṁ rauravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ .
rājarakṣita dharmma . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
